👷 Create GitHub Activity Monitor Automation

Please create the scheduled automation now; do not ask follow-up questions. Name it exactly "OpenHands public GitHub activity UI-only QA 2026-05-16T15-09-58-126Z". It must be enabled and scheduled every 5 minutes with cron */5 * * * * in UTC. The automation must be read-only: each run should inspect public GitHub activity from the past hour across org:OpenHands public repositories, including issues, pull requests, releases, and notable commits if available, summarize the recent activity in the automation run conversation, and never post comments, open issues, push code, change labels, or otherwise mutate GitHub. You may use the GitHub token provided in /workspace/project/.env for read-only GitHub API access. Use the local OpenHands automation backend available in the runtime services and authenticate exactly as instructed there. After creating the automation, reply with UI_ONLY_AUTOMATION_CREATED and the exact automation name.

246        mcp_config = workspace.get_mcp_config()
247        if mcp_config and mcp_config.get("mcpServers"):
248            print(f"  servers: {list(mcp_config['mcpServers'].keys())}")

255    # Get default agent with tools and condenser (CLI mode to disable browser)
256    print("\n=== AGENT ===")
257    agent = get_default_agent(llm=llm, cli_mode=True)
258
259    # Add MCP config and agent_context using model_copy if configured
260    agent_updates = {}
261    if mcp_config:
262        agent_updates["mcp_config"] = mcp_config
263    if agent_context:
264        agent_updates["agent_context"] = agent_context
265    if agent_updates:
266        agent = agent.model_copy(update=agent_updates)
267
268    print(f"  tools: {[t.name for t in agent.tools]}")
269    print(f"  mcp_config: {'configured' if mcp_config else 'none'}")
270    print(f"  skills: {len(loaded_skills) if loaded_skills else 0}")
271    condenser_name = type(agent.condenser).__name__ if agent.condenser else "none"
272    print(f"  condenser: {condenser_name}")
273
274    # Create conversation
275    print("\n=== CONVERSATION ===")
276    received_events: list = []
277    last_event_time = {"ts": time.time()}
278
279    def event_callback(event) -> None:
280        received_events.append(event)
281        last_event_time["ts"] = time.time()
282
283    conversation = Conversation(
284        agent=agent,
285        workspace=workspace,
286        callbacks=[event_callback],
287        delete_on_close=False,  # Keep conversation history after completion
288    )
289    assert isinstance(conversation, RemoteConversation)
290    print(f"  conversation created: {type(conversation).__name__}")
291
292    # Inject secrets into the conversation (as LookupSecret references)
293    if secrets:
294        conversation.update_secrets(secrets)
295        print(f"  injected {len(secrets)} secrets into conversation")
296
297    try:
298        print(f"  sending prompt: {USER_PROMPT[:80]}...")
299        conversation.send_message(USER_PROMPT)
300        conversation.run()
301
302        # Wait for the stream to settle
303        while time.time() - last_event_time["ts"] < 2.0:
304            time.sleep(0.1)
305
306        cost = conversation.conversation_stats.get_combined_metrics().accumulated_cost
307        print(f"  cost: {cost}")
308        print(f"  events received: {len(received_events)}")
309    finally:
310        conversation.close()
311
